title: N.Y.C.R.R. Express Trains
obv: N.Y.C.R.R. EX. TRAINS LEAVE ALBANY 7-30 & 9 A.M. 12-20 & 6 P.M.
rev: N.Y.C.R.R. Ex. Trains Leave Buffalo 5 & 8 A.M. 5-45 & 10-55 P.M.
desc: Bronze timetable token for New York Central Railroad express train service between Albany and Buffalo.
notes: Listed as TT-F in the Timetable Tokens section of the Atwood-Coffee catalogue. Obverse gives departure times from Albany. Reverse gives departure times from Buffalo.

title: New-York and Albany Peoples Line of Steam Boats
obv: NEW-YORK AND ALBANY PEOPLES LINE OF STEAM BOATS
rev: Time Table Leave N.Y. 6 P.M. / Leave Albany 7 ½ P.M.
desc: Timetable token for the New-York and Albany Peoples Line of Steam Boats.
notes: Listed as TT-G in the timetable token section. Bronze, 19mm, struck round. Catalog value 15.00.

title: Shore Line Boston to New York
obv: SHORE LINE BOSTON TO NEW YORK
rev: Leave Boston at 1 P.M. & 9:30 P.M. / Sundays at 9:30 P.M.
desc: Timetable token for the Shore Line route between Boston and New York.
notes: Listed as TT-H in the timetable token section. Vulcanite, 32mm, struck round. Catalog value 45.00.

title: Stonington Line Boston to New York
desc: Timetable token for the Stonington Line route between Boston and New York.
notes: Listed as TT-I in the timetable token section. Vulcanite, 32mm, struck round. Catalog value 125.00.

title: Stonington Line Boston to New York
obv: STONINGTON LINE BOSTON TO NEW YORK
rev: Leave Boston at 6 P.M. Except Sundays
desc: Timetable token for the Stonington Line route between Boston and New York.
notes: Listed as TT-J in the timetable token section. Vulcanite, 32mm, struck round. Catalog value 60.00.
